sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. vitamin C reputation is a real strength because that gives it a clear in-category edge. easy to use as a whole food because simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating. brings a clean fruit identity because it still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. protein contribution is tiny because that is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth. sugar can climb fast because a lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet. satiety is not especially strong because fruit often needs help from the rest of the meal.

closing.summary: Orange does have some solid upside, especially vitamin C reputation is a real strength and easy to use as a whole food. but protein contribution is tiny and sugar can climb fast keep it from climbing higher. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
